action: In Visual Studio Code, open the calculator_app.py file inside the src folder. Click the play button at the top-right corner of the editor pane to run the Python file. Confirm when the file starts running.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps: is the first action. The current screen shows Visual Studio Code with the 'calculator_app.py' file already open in the editor pane. To run the Python file, I need to click the play (Run) button, which is typically located at the top-right corner of the editor pane. I will look for the play button in that area and click it to start running the file.
